summary: Iteration 49: Demo Seed Target User Selection Feature - Full E2E testing completed. Backend API tests: 7/8 passed (1 failed due to rate limiting which is expected behavior). Frontend UI verification: All checks passed - Demo buttons visible in user rows, modal opens with target user select field, target summary displays selected user info, submit flow shows result state with target info preserved.

minor.issue: Rate limit (429) hit when testing already_seeded state in rapid succession - expected behavior due to rate limiting protection

passed_tests: GET /api/admin/demo/seed-targets returns users with agency_admin or agency_agent role
GET /api/admin/demo/seed-targets response contains required fields (id, email, status, roles)
POST /api/admin/demo/seed with target_user_id returns 200 and seeds data
POST /api/admin/demo/seed response contains target_user_id, target_user_email, target_agency_id, target_agency_name
Admin All Users page displays Demo buttons per user row with testid seed-demo-user-{userId}
Demo modal opens when clicking row Demo button
Demo modal shows target user select field (demo-seed-target-select)
Demo modal target select populates with agency users (4 options)
Demo modal shows target summary with user name, email, and agency
Demo modal submit flow works without user-facing errors
Demo modal result state shows 'Demo verisi zaten hazir' (already_seeded state)
Demo modal result state preserves and displays target user info (Yüklenen hedef section)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly validates target_user_id belongs to agency role user with agency_id
DemoSeedResponse model properly includes target_user_id, target_user_name, target_user_email, target_agency_id, target_agency_name fields
Already seeded response correctly preserves target user info from demo_seed_runs collection
Frontend DemoSeedButton correctly loads seed targets via getDemoSeedTargets() and displays select field
Frontend correctly passes target_user_id in seedDemoData() API call
Frontend result state properly displays target info from response

success_rate.backend: 87.5% (7/8 tests passed - 1 failed due to expected rate limiting)

seed_data_creation: Demo seed was triggered for agency2@demo.test user (Demo Acente A) during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 verified demo seed target user selection feature. Backend endpoints: GET /api/admin/demo/seed-targets (returns agency users list), POST /api/admin/demo/seed with target_user_id parameter. Frontend: DemoSeedButton component on AdminAllUsersPage with row-level Demo buttons (testid: seed-demo-user-{userId}). Modal shows target select field (testid: demo-seed-target-select) and target summary. Rate limiting is active (3 requests per 60 seconds per user). 8 pytest tests + comprehensive UI verification complete.
